title: Denomination
description: A single bill or coin denomination. Value is stored as integer cents to prevent floating-point drift across kiosks. The stable ID must never change once assigned.

id.description: Stable machine-readable identifier. Format: {KIND}_{CURRENCY}_{VALUE_CENTS_PADDED}. Must never change once a kiosk has been deployed.

value_cents.description: Face value expressed as an integer number of cents (e.g. $1.00 = 100, $0.25 = 25).

display_label.description: Human-readable label rendered on the kiosk UI and printed voucher (e.g. '$1', '$0.25', '25¢').

theme.description: Visual theme name controlling colors and artwork. Allows the same denomination set to render correctly for different currencies/locales without changing numeric values.

enabled.description: When false the kiosk must not accept or dispense this denomination. Defaults to true.
